rewritten_requirements: The system shall measure temperature using sensors.
The system shall live update weather data for user view.
The system shall provide tips and alerts on certain weather conditions.
The system shall plot graphs based on temperature variations for easier analysis.
The system shall predict the future weather for the next few days.
The system shall display the average, highest, and lowest weekly temperatures.

source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Weather Status – With this function, temperature, humidity, rainfall, pressure and dew point are measured using sensors.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Live update weather data for user view
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Data are live updated to be viewed by the user.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Provide tips and alerts on certain weather conditions
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This functionality provides tips and alerts to the user on certain weather conditions.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Plot graphs based on temperature variations for easier analysis
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Plotting of graphs based on variations in temperature for easier analysis.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Predict future weather for next few days
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: This functionality helps in predicting the weather for the next few days.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Display average, highest and lowest weekly temperatures
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Displaying the average, the highest and lowest temperature of the week.
